events.title: Sasha & John Digweed return to the Main Hall on September 25.
events.description: Just Announced: Sasha & John Digweed return to the Main Hall on September 25. The original superstar DJs, @djsashaofficial and @djjohndigweed helped define the modern DJ landscape in the early ‘90s and have remained touchstones for generations of artists who followed in their wake.

events.title: The Bronx River Alliance is excited to announce the launch of the 2026 Community
events.description: The Bronx River Alliance is excited to announce the launch of the 2026 Community Grants program. Entering its third year, the program will award 10 small grants of $200 each to community facilitators interested in leading programming that activates and highlights the parks along the Bronx River.
